name: plan-design-review

---

Review the plan as a pre-implementation design audit.

Output exactly these sections:
1. Design scorecard
2. What a 10 would look like
3. Missing states or UX gaps
4. Ambiguities that will haunt implementation
5. Recommended plan edits before build

Plan or brief:
${input:plan:Paste the plan or feature brief}
